sqlMap.select:
/*ReportWrite001.selectReport001SheetList*/ SELECT ROWNUM AS ROW_NUM , CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN 'tot' WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN 'office0' ELSE 'dept' END AS PRE_STYLE_NM , T.* FROM ( SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.SHEET_CD AS SHEET_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.DEPT_CNT AS DEPT_CNT , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , A.COL0 AS COL0 , A.COL1 AS COL1 , CAST((NVL(A.COL2, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL2 , CAST(((NVL(A.COL5, 0) + NVL(A.COL7, 0) + NVL(A.COL9, 0) + NVL(A.COL10, 0) + NVL(A.COL11, 0) + NVL(A.COL12, 0) + NVL(A.COL13, 0) + NVL(A.COL14, 0) + NVL(A.COL15, 0) + NVL(A.COL16, 0) + NVL(A.COL17, 0) + NVL(A.COL18, 0) + NVL(A.COL19, 0))/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL3 , CAST(((NVL(A.COL5, 0) + NVL(A.COL7, 0) + NVL(A.COL9, 0) + NVL(A.COL10, 0) + NVL(A.COL11, 0) + NVL(A.COL12, 0) + NVL(A.COL13, 0) + NVL(A.COL14, 0) + NVL(A.COL15, 0))/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL4 , CAST((NVL(A.COL5, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL5 , CAST(((NVL(A.COL7, 0) + NVL(A.COL9, 0) + NVL(A.COL10, 0) + NVL(A.COL11, 0) + NVL(A.COL12, 0))/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL6 , CAST((NVL(A.COL7, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL7 , CAST(((NVL(A.COL9, 0) + NVL(A.COL10, 0) + NVL(A.COL11, 0))/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL8 , CAST((NVL(A.COL9, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL9 , CAST((NVL(A.COL10, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL10 , CAST((NVL(A.COL11, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL11 , CAST((NVL(A.COL12, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL12 , CAST((NVL(A.COL13, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL13 , CAST((NVL(A.COL14, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL14 , CAST((NVL(A.COL15, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL15 , CAST((NVL(A.COL16, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL16 , CAST((NVL(A.COL17, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL17 , CAST((NVL(A.COL18, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL18 , CAST((NVL(A.COL19, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL19 FROM ( SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' , 2, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000' , 3, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || B.DEPT_CD) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '000' || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' , 2, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' , 3, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000') AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , B.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , B.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , B.SHEET_CD AS SHEET_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', B.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', 2, '0000000', B.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , H.CT - 1 AS DGR_LEVEL , COUNT(B.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CNT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '합 계', 2, B.OFFICE_NM, '') AS COL0 , DECODE(H.CT, 3, B.DEPT_NM, '') AS COL1 , SUM(S.COL2) AS COL2, SUM(S.COL3) AS COL3, SUM(S.COL4) AS COL4, SUM(S.COL5) AS COL5, SUM(S.COL6) AS COL6, SUM(S.COL7) AS COL7, SUM(S.COL8) AS COL8, SUM(S.COL9) AS COL9, SUM(S.COL10) AS COL10 , SUM(S.COL11) AS COL11, SUM(S.COL12) AS COL12, SUM(S.COL13) AS COL13, SUM(S.COL14) AS COL14, SUM(S.COL15) AS COL15, SUM(S.COL16) AS COL16, SUM(S.COL17) AS COL17, SUM(S.COL18) AS COL18, SUM(S.COL19) AS COL19 FROM (SELECT BB.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , BB.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , BB.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , BB.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 'T10', 2, 'T20', 'T30') AS SHEET_CD , MAX(BB.OFFICE_NM) AS OFFICE_NM , MAX(BB.DEPT_NM) AS DEPT_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT BB , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 3) H WHERE 1 = 1 AND BB.DEPT_FG != '40' AND BB.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BB.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
AND BB.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND BB.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND BB.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
GROUP BY BB.FIS_YEAR , BB.BGT_DGR , BB.OFFICE_CD , BB.DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 'T10', 2, 'T20', 'T30') ) B , ( SELECT SS.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , SS.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , SS.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , SS.SHEET_CD AS SHEET_CD , SUM(SS.COL2) AS COL2, SUM(SS.COL3) AS COL3, SUM(SS.COL4) AS COL4, SUM(SS.COL5) AS COL5, SUM(SS.COL6) AS COL6, SUM(SS.COL7) AS COL7, SUM(SS.COL8) AS COL8, SUM(SS.COL9) AS COL9, SUM(SS.COL10) AS COL10 , SUM(SS.COL11) AS COL11, SUM(SS.COL12) AS COL12, SUM(SS.COL13) AS COL13, SUM(SS.COL14) AS COL14, SUM(SS.COL15) AS COL15, SUM(SS.COL16) AS COL16, SUM(SS.COL17) AS COL17, SUM(SS.COL18) AS COL18, SUM(SS.COL19) AS COL19 FROM ( SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , E.SHEET_CD AS SHEET_CD , 0 AS COL2 , 0 AS COL3 , 0 AS COL4 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '1', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL5 , 0 AS COL6 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '2', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL7 , 0 AS COL8 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '3', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL9 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '4', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL10 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '5', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL11 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '6', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL12 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '7', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL13 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '8', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL14 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '9', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL15 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), 'A', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL16 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), 'B', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL17 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), 'C', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL18 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), 'D', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL19 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_SHEET E , TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC F , TB_YEARFRSC G WHERE 1 = 1 AND G.FIS_YEAR = F.FIS_YEAR AND G.FRSC_FG_CD = F.FRSC_FG_CD AND G.STAND_FRSC_CD IN ('160', '180') AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD = '100' AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND F.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND F.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND F.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND E.SHEET_CD IN ('T10', 'T20', 'T30') AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
) SS GROUP BY SS.FIS_YEAR , SS.BGT_DGR , SS.DEPT_CD , SS.SHEET_CD ) S , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 3) H WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.FIS_YEAR = S.FIS_YEAR(+) AND B.BGT_DGR = S.BGT_DGR(+) AND B.DEPT_CD = S.DEPT_CD(+) AND B.SHEET_CD = S.SHEET_CD(+) AND DECODE(H.CT, 1, 'Y', 2, 'Y', CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Z.DEPT_CD) FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.OFFICE_CD = B.OFFICE_CD) > 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) = 'Y' GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' , 2, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000' , 3, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || B.DEPT_CD) ) A ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.SHEET_CD, '000') , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000')

/*ReportWrite001.selectReportTotSheetList*/ SELECT ROWNUM AS ROW_NUM , CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN 'tot' WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN 'office0' ELSE 'dept' END AS PRE_STYLE_NM , T.* FROM ( SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.SHEET_CD AS SHEET_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.DEPT_CNT AS DEPT_CNT , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , A.COL0 AS COL0 , A.COL1 AS COL1 , CAST((NVL(A.COL2, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL2 , CAST(((NVL(A.COL5, 0) + NVL(A.COL7, 0) + NVL(A.COL9, 0) + NVL(A.COL10, 0) + NVL(A.COL11, 0) + NVL(A.COL12, 0) + NVL(A.COL13, 0) + NVL(A.COL14, 0) + NVL(A.COL15, 0) + NVL(A.COL16, 0) + NVL(A.COL17, 0) + NVL(A.COL18, 0) + NVL(A.COL19, 0))/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL3 , CAST(((NVL(A.COL5, 0) + NVL(A.COL7, 0) + NVL(A.COL9, 0) + NVL(A.COL10, 0) + NVL(A.COL11, 0) + NVL(A.COL12, 0) + NVL(A.COL13, 0) + NVL(A.COL14, 0) + NVL(A.COL15, 0))/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL4 , CAST((NVL(A.COL5, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL5 , CAST(((NVL(A.COL7, 0) + NVL(A.COL9, 0) + NVL(A.COL10, 0) + NVL(A.COL11, 0) + NVL(A.COL12, 0))/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL6 , CAST((NVL(A.COL7, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL7 , CAST(((NVL(A.COL9, 0) + NVL(A.COL10, 0) + NVL(A.COL11, 0))/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL8 , CAST((NVL(A.COL9, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL9 , CAST((NVL(A.COL10, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL10 , CAST((NVL(A.COL11, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL11 , CAST((NVL(A.COL12, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL12 , CAST((NVL(A.COL13, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL13 , CAST((NVL(A.COL14, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL14 , CAST((NVL(A.COL15, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL15 , CAST((NVL(A.COL16, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL16 , CAST((NVL(A.COL17, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL17 , CAST((NVL(A.COL18, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL18 , CAST((NVL(A.COL19, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL19 FROM ( SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' , 2, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000' , 3, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || B.DEPT_CD) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '000' || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' , 2, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' , 3, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000') AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , B.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , B.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , B.SHEET_CD AS SHEET_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', B.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', 2, '0000000', B.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , H.CT - 1 AS DGR_LEVEL , COUNT(B.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CNT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '합 계', 2, B.OFFICE_NM, '') AS COL0 , DECODE(H.CT, 3, B.DEPT_NM, '') AS COL1 , SUM(S.COL2) AS COL2, SUM(S.COL3) AS COL3, SUM(S.COL4) AS COL4, SUM(S.COL5) AS COL5, SUM(S.COL6) AS COL6, SUM(S.COL7) AS COL7, SUM(S.COL8) AS COL8, SUM(S.COL9) AS COL9, SUM(S.COL10) AS COL10 , SUM(S.COL11) AS COL11, SUM(S.COL12) AS COL12, SUM(S.COL13) AS COL13, SUM(S.COL14) AS COL14, SUM(S.COL15) AS COL15, SUM(S.COL16) AS COL16, SUM(S.COL17) AS COL17, SUM(S.COL18) AS COL18, SUM(S.COL19) AS COL19 FROM (SELECT BB.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , BB.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , BB.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , BB.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , 'T00' AS SHEET_CD , MAX(BB.OFFICE_NM) AS OFFICE_NM , MAX(BB.DEPT_NM) AS DEPT_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT BB WHERE 1 = 1 AND BB.DEPT_FG != '40' AND BB.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BB.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
AND BB.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND BB.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND BB.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
GROUP BY BB.FIS_YEAR , BB.BGT_DGR , BB.OFFICE_CD , BB.DEPT_CD ) B , ( SELECT SS.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , SS.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , SS.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , SS.SHEET_CD AS SHEET_CD , SUM(SS.COL2) AS COL2, SUM(SS.COL3) AS COL3, SUM(SS.COL4) AS COL4, SUM(SS.COL5) AS COL5, SUM(SS.COL6) AS COL6, SUM(SS.COL7) AS COL7, SUM(SS.COL8) AS COL8, SUM(SS.COL9) AS COL9, SUM(SS.COL10) AS COL10 , SUM(SS.COL11) AS COL11, SUM(SS.COL12) AS COL12, SUM(SS.COL13) AS COL13, SUM(SS.COL14) AS COL14, SUM(SS.COL15) AS COL15, SUM(SS.COL16) AS COL16, SUM(SS.COL17) AS COL17, SUM(SS.COL18) AS COL18, SUM(SS.COL19) AS COL19 FROM ( SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , 'T00' AS SHEET_CD , 0 AS COL2 , 0 AS COL3 , 0 AS COL4 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '1', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL5 , 0 AS COL6 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '2', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL7 , 0 AS COL8 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '3', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL9 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '4', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL10 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '5', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL11 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '6', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL12 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '7', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL13 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '8', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL14 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), '9', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL15 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), 'A', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL16 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), 'B', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL17 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), 'C', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL18 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), 'D', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL19 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_SHEET E , TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC F , TB_YEARFRSC G WHERE 1 = 1 AND G.FIS_YEAR = F.FIS_YEAR AND G.FRSC_FG_CD = F.FRSC_FG_CD AND G.STAND_FRSC_CD IN ('160', '180') AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD = '100' AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND F.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND F.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND F.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND E.SHEET_CD IN ('T10', 'T20', 'T30') AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
) SS GROUP BY SS.FIS_YEAR , SS.BGT_DGR , SS.DEPT_CD , SS.SHEET_CD ) S , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 3) H WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.FIS_YEAR = S.FIS_YEAR(+) AND B.BGT_DGR = S.BGT_DGR(+) AND B.DEPT_CD = S.DEPT_CD(+) AND B.SHEET_CD = S.SHEET_CD(+) AND DECODE(H.CT, 1, 'Y', 2, 'Y', CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Z.DEPT_CD) FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.OFFICE_CD = B.OFFICE_CD) > 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) = 'Y' GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' , 2, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000' , 3, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || B.DEPT_CD) ) A ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.SHEET_CD, '000') , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000')

/*ReportWrite001.selectReportTotSheetList2*/ SELECT ROWNUM AS ROW_NUM , CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN 'tot' WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN 'deptFg' ELSE 'office' END AS PRE_STYLE_NM , CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN '합 계' WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 AND OFFICE_CNT > 1 THEN T.DEPT_FG_NM ELSE DECODE(T.DEPT_FG, '21', T.DEPT_NM, T.OFFICE_NM) END AS COL0 , T.* FROM ( SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.SHEET_CD AS SHEET_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DEPT_FG AS DEPT_FG , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.OFFICE_CNT AS OFFICE_CNT , DECODE(A.DEPT_FG, '00', 0, '20', 10, '10', 20, '11', 30, '21', 40, 90) AS DEPT_FG_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_FG_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_FG = A.DEPT_FG AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS DEPT_FG_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS DEPT_NM , A.COL1 AS COL1 , CAST((NVL(A.COL2, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL2 , CAST((NVL(A.COL3, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL3 , CAST((NVL(A.COL4, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL4 , CAST((NVL(A.COL5, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL5 , CAST((NVL(A.COL6, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL6 , CAST((NVL(A.COL7, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL7 , CAST((NVL(A.COL8, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL8 , CAST((NVL(A.COL9, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL9 , CAST((NVL(A.COL10, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL10 , CAST((NVL(A.COL11, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL11 , CAST((NVL(A.COL12, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL12 , CAST((NVL(A.COL13, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL13 , CAST((NVL(A.COL14, 0)/1000) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL14 FROM ( SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || '00' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || B.DEPT_FG || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || B.DEPT_FG || '_' || DECODE(B.DEPT_FG, '21', B.OFFICE_CD || B.DEPT_CD, B.OFFICE_CD || '0000000')) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '000' || '_' || '00' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || '00' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.SHEET_CD || '_' || DECODE(B.CNT_YN, 'N', '00', B.DEPT_FG) || '_' || '00000000000') AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , B.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , B.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , B.SHEET_CD AS SHEET_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00', B.DEPT_FG) AS DEPT_FG , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', 2, '0000', B.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', 2, '0000000', DECODE(B.DEPT_FG, '21', B.DEPT_CD, '0000000')) AS DEPT_CD , H.CT - 1 AS DGR_LEVEL , COUNT(B.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CNT , '' AS COL1 , SUM(S.COL2) AS COL2, SUM(S.COL3) AS COL3, SUM(S.COL4) AS COL4, SUM(S.COL5) AS COL5, SUM(S.COL6) AS COL6, SUM(S.COL7) AS COL7, SUM(S.COL8) AS COL8, SUM(S.COL9) AS COL9, SUM(S.COL10) AS COL10 , SUM(S.COL11) AS COL11, SUM(S.COL12) AS COL12, SUM(S.COL13) AS COL13, SUM(S.COL14) AS COL14 FROM (SELECT BB.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , BB.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , BB.DEPT_FG AS DEPT_FG , BB.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , BB.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , 'T40' AS SHEET_CD , CASE WHEN BB.DEPT_FG = '21' AND (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Z.DEPT_CD) FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.DEPT_FG = BB.DEPT_FG) > 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Z.OFFICE_CD) FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.DEPT_FG = BB.DEPT_FG) > 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END END AS CNT_YN FROM TB_DGRDEPT BB WHERE 1 = 1 AND BB.DEPT_FG != '40' AND BB.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BB.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
AND BB.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND BB.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND BB.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
GROUP BY BB.FIS_YEAR , BB.BGT_DGR , BB.DEPT_FG , BB.OFFICE_CD , BB.DEPT_CD ) B , ( SELECT SS.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , SS.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , SS.DEPT_FG AS DEPT_FG , SS.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , SS.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , SS.SHEET_CD AS SHEET_CD , SUM(SS.COL2) AS COL2, SUM(SS.COL3) AS COL3, SUM(SS.COL4) AS COL4, SUM(SS.COL5) AS COL5, SUM(SS.COL6) AS COL6, SUM(SS.COL7) AS COL7, SUM(SS.COL8) AS COL8, SUM(SS.COL9) AS COL9, SUM(SS.COL10) AS COL10 , SUM(SS.COL11) AS COL11, SUM(SS.COL12) AS COL12, SUM(SS.COL13) AS COL13, SUM(SS.COL14) AS COL14 FROM ( SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , B.DEPT_FG AS DEPT_FG , B.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , B.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , 'T40' AS SHEET_CD , 0 AS COL2 , 0 AS COL3 , CASE WHEN E.SHEET_CD = 'T10' AND SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3) = '1' THEN NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS COL4 , CASE WHEN E.SHEET_CD = 'T10' AND SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3) IN ('2', '3', '4', '5', '6') THEN NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS COL5 , CASE WHEN E.SHEET_CD = 'T10' AND SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3) = '7' THEN NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS COL6 , CASE WHEN E.SHEET_CD = 'T10' AND SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3) = '8' THEN NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS COL7 , CASE WHEN E.SHEET_CD = 'T10' AND SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3) = '9' THEN NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS COL8 , CASE WHEN E.SHEET_CD IN ('T20', 'T30') AND SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3) IN ('1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7', '8', '9') THEN NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS COL9 , 0 AS COL10 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), 'A', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL11 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), 'B', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL12 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), 'C', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL13 , DECODE(SUBSTR(E.SHEET_DETL_CD, 3), 'D', NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0) AS COL14 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_SHEET E , TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC F , TB_YEARFRSC G WHERE 1 = 1 AND G.FIS_YEAR = F.FIS_YEAR AND G.FRSC_FG_CD = F.FRSC_FG_CD AND G.STAND_FRSC_CD IN ('160', '180') AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD = '100' AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND F.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND F.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND F.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND E.SHEET_CD IN ('T10', 'T20', 'T30') AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
UNION ALL SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , B.DEPT_FG AS DEPT_FG , B.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , B.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , 'T40' AS SHEET_CD , 0 AS COL2 , 0 AS COL3 , 0 AS COL4 , 0 AS COL5 , 0 AS COL6 , 0 AS COL7 , 0 AS COL8 , 0 AS COL9 , CASE WHEN A.SHEET_YN = 'N' AND A.REPORT_YN_090 = 'Y' AND A.REPORT_YN_030 = 'N' AND G.STAND_FRSC_CD IN ('160', '180') THEN NVL(F.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS COL10 , 0 AS COL11 , 0 AS COL12 , 0 AS COL13 , 0 AS COL14 FROM (SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , CASE WHEN SUM(DECODE(B.SHEET_CD, NULL, 0, '', 0, 1)) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SHEET_YN , CASE WHEN SUM(DECODE(C.REPORT_CD, '030', 1, 0)) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS REPORT_YN_030 , CASE WHEN SUM(DECODE(C.REPORT_CD, '090', 1, 0)) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS REPORT_YN_090 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_SHEET B , TB_REPORT C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = B.FIS_YEAR(+) AND A.BGT_DGR = B.BGT_DGR(+) AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = B.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID(+) AND A.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR(+) AND A.BGT_DGR = C.BGT_DGR(+) AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = C.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID(+) AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# GROUP BY A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD ) A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC F , TB_YEARFRSC G WHERE 1 = 1 AND G.FIS_YEAR = F.FIS_YEAR AND G.FRSC_FG_CD = F.FRSC_FG_CD AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD = '100' AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND F.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND F.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND F.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
) SS GROUP BY SS.FIS_YEAR , SS.BGT_DGR , SS.DEPT_FG , SS.OFFICE_CD , SS.DEPT_CD , SS.SHEET_CD ) S , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 3) H WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.FIS_YEAR = S.FIS_YEAR(+) AND B.BGT_DGR = S.BGT_DGR(+) AND B.DEPT_FG = S.DEPT_FG(+) AND B.OFFICE_CD = S.OFFICE_CD(+) AND B.DEPT_CD = S.DEPT_CD(+) AND B.SHEET_CD = S.SHEET_CD(+) AND DECODE(H.CT, 1, 'Y', 2, B.CNT_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '00' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.DEPT_FG || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, B.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(B.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.DEPT_FG || '_' || DECODE(B.DEPT_FG, '21', B.OFFICE_CD || B.DEPT_CD, B.OFFICE_CD || '0000000')) ) A ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.SHEET_CD, '000') , NVL(T.DEPT_FG_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000')
